base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of podoboo_lava_bubble_pulse — a character from 1985 super mario bros. arc-jumping lava-bubble expands/contracts as it rises from pit then falls. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame flame pulse — arc-jumping lava-bubble expands/contracts as it rises from pit then falls; fixed sine-arc trajectory
